overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a futuristic urban park in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a large metallic religious statue, overgrown vegetation, and scattered homeless encampments. The camera circles the statue before proceeding deeper into the shaded park interior.

agents.ego_description: circling slowly around the large metallic statue, observing the plaza surroundings

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on a concrete bench near the statue

entered.detail: monumental bronze-colored religious figure with outstretched arms mounted on a geometric pedestal
low modern concrete seating arranged around the plaza
silver metal barriers lining the plaza edge
futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades towering behind the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza dominated by a massive metallic statue of a figure with outstretched arms. The camera circles the monument, revealing concrete benches, metal railings, and futuristic skyscrapers visible through the sparse tree cover. A homeless person sits on a bench to the right, and the ground is paved concrete with some scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway between plaza and park interior

events.description: moves past the statue and enters the main park walkway lined with trees and urban infrastructure

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the paved path past the statue, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward the camera on the path

entered.detail: stacked green industrial waste containers along the right side of the path
elevated concrete highway structure visible through the trees in the background

segments.scene_description: Leaving the statue behind, the camera moves along a concrete walkway flanked by increasing tree cover. Green dumpsters and an elevated highway overpass become visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk along the path, including one approaching the camera, while the ground shows signs of urban decay with scattered trash and graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban park with homeless encampments

events.description: lighting shifts to deep shade as camera enters heavily wooded area with dense canopy cover

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered park interior, passing close to homeless encampments

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter with overgrown vegetation
tall cylindrical lamp post with vertical fluorescent lighting
scattered belongings, cardboard, and trash bags indicating informal settlement

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a densely vegetated park interior with thick tree canopy blocking much of the sky. The ground is covered with paved tiles and scattered debris. Vertical light posts and concrete planters emerge, while homeless encampments with scattered belongings become prominent along the path. The lighting becomes noticeably darker and more diffused.

events.description: camera slows and approaches a homeless person sitting on the ground among scattered debris

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe a homeless person sitting among trash and belongings in the shaded clearing

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on cardboard surrounded by bottles and bags, gesturing with hands

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers and metal barrels
illuminated advertisement visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a deeply shaded, secluded area of the park with dense tree cover and low light levels. The camera approaches a homeless person sitting on the ground surrounded by scattered bottles, bags, and cardboard. Trash barrels and barriers appear on the left, while a distant neon sign glows through the foliage. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the deeply shaded and secluded depths of a futuristic park. It begins by circling a massive metallic statue with outstretched arms under a clear sky, passing concrete benches and skyscrapers visible through sparse trees. As the camera leaves the monument behind, the scene shifts toward a concrete walkway where the tree cover thickens and the environment reveals signs of decay, including graffiti and an elevated highway overpass in the distance. The path then transitions into a densely vegetated interior where the canopy blocks the sky and the lighting becomes darker and more diffused, bringing homeless encampments and concrete planters into view. Finally, the camera glides into a quiet, isolated area of dappled sunlight and low light, approaching a person sitting among scattered debris while a distant neon sign glows through the thick foliage.
